title: New Ecommerce Tools: May 20, 2026
description:
This week: quick commerce, SMS marketing, SEO, agentic storefronts, multichannel management, flexible payments, AI selling agents, and dynamic product ads.
The post New Ecommerce Tools: May 20, 2026 appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: Best AI search analytics tools for marketing teams
description: I’ve spent the last year watching marketing teams scramble to understand why their organic traffic reports tell one story while their pipeline tells another. The missing link is almost always a need for AI search analytics tools.

title: U.K. brands spend more on retail media but ‘disconnected commerce’ hampers faster growth
description: U.K. and EU spending on RMNs is rising, but marketers say issues around measurement and internal tugs-of-war are holding back upper-funnel investment.

title: ‘Trust becomes the product’: Marketers grapple with Google’s new suite of AI-powered ad agents
description: First comes innovation, then comes transparency. At least that seems to be Google’s approach as the tech behemoth enters its agentic era. At Google Marketing Live (GML) yesterday, Google announced a new souped up suite of agentic ad tools backed by its LLM, Gemini. Google plans to roll out more ads in AI Mode in […]

title: Lowe’s efforts to win over pros could save it from the home sector’s challenges
description: The retailer — which saw sales increase 10% in Q1 — is turning to the customer segment as DIY demand remains down.

title: Can Target’s small upgrades to carts, bathrooms lead to big wins?
description: The retailer's efforts to modernize its experience aim to create durable long-term value for a key demographic: busy families.

title: Klarna releases AI search app for shopping in ChatGPT
description:
Payments provider Klarna has launched an artificial intelligence (AI)-powered app in OpenAI’s ChatGPT centered around shopping and search. The Klarna Shopping Search app in ChatGPT enables users to describe the types of products they’re looking for and, in one conversation, see visual results with up-to-date prices, availability and offers from multiple merchants, according to the […]
The post Klarna releases AI search app for shopping in ChatGPT appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Home Depot puts AI tools for Pro customers into one workspace
description:
Home Depot has deployed strategies to expand on its B2B sales through its Pro segment in Q1, including refining artificial intelligence (AI) tools, bolstering partnerships and making another acquisition. CEO Ed Decker said Home Depot’s objective is to win more Pro business, products and purchase occasions. He claimed that no retailer has the scale or […]
The post Home Depot puts AI tools for Pro customers into one workspace appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Google unveils its new Universal Cart for agentic commerce
description:
Google kicked off its annual Google I/O developer conference on May 19 with numerous announcements, including new details about its latest agentic commerce and checkout tool, the Universal Cart. Universal Cart is built on top of Google’s Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP), which enables artificial intelligence (AI) agents to communicate with payments infrastructure in ecommerce transactions. […]
The post Google unveils its new Universal Cart for agentic commerce appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Google upgrades AI search ads: what marketers need to know
description: A range of new tools announced at Marketing Live follow the platform enacting a signifcant overhaul of the search experience to prirotize AI chats.

title: Ally courts millennial, Gen Z customers with new brand platform
description: Developed with Anomaly LA, the “Life Today” campaign sees the digital bank throw playful shade on competitors’ brick-and-mortar model.

title: Centenario Tequila celebrates Mexican pride in campaign ahead of World Cup
description: “Todo o Nada” was led by an all-Mexican creative team and will run in the U.S. across linear TV, digital video and both paid and organic social channels.

title: LiveRamp’s Data Gives Publicis a New Way Into Commerce Media and Agentic AI
description: Publicis Groupe's $2.2 billion acquisition of data firm LiveRamp could help the holding company better compete in a commerce media landscape dominated by Amazon.

title: Omnicom’s John Wren Made More Than Double All Other Advertising Holdco CEOs Combined in 2025
description: Omnicom CEO John Wren earned nearly $70 million in 2025—more than twice the combined pay of every other major advertising holdco CEO, with Publicis' Arthur Sadoun trailing as the next-highest earner at $9.4 million.

title: What’s the future of AI and RCS in mobile messaging?
description:
Consumers are caught in a battle between volume and relevance when it comes to messages, and AI can either help or hurt the problem. 
The post What’s the future of AI and RCS in mobile messaging? appeared first on MarTech.
